title: felicia knella
intro: Felicia knella, also known as Felicia amelloides, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family native to southern Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Felicia knella include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. It can be prepared for herbal use by drying the leaves and flowers, then making infusions, decoctions, or teas to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
